mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ordersdetail (ordersId, goodsId, num, price, money, state) VALUES (#{ordersId}, #{goodsId}, #{num}, #{price}, #{money}, #{state})
mapper.update: UPDATE ordersdetail SET state = #{state}, endtime = #{endtime}, ender = #{ender}, storeId = #{storeId} WHERE odid = #{odid}
UPDATE ordersdetail SET state = #{state}, endtime = #{endtime}, ender = #{ender}, storeId = #{storeId} WHERE odid = #{odid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ordersdetail WHERE ordersId = #{ordersId} AND state = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE ordersdetail SET num = #{num}, price = #{price}, money = #{money} WHERE odid = #{odid}
